2605.12334.title: Reinforcing VLAs in Task-Agnostic World Models
2605.12334.paper_summary: Post-training Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models via reinforcement learning (RL) in learned world models has emerged as an effective strategy to adapt to new tasks without costly real-world interactions. However, while using imagined trajectories reduces the sample complexity of policy training, existing methods still heavily rely on task-specific data to fine-tune both the world and reward models, fundamentally limiting their scalability to unseen tasks. To overcome this, we argue that world and reward models should capture transferable physical priors that enable zero-shot inference. We propose RAW-Dream (Reinforcing VLAs in task-Agnostic World Dreams), a new paradigm that completely disentangles world model learning from downstream task dependencies. RAW-Dream utilizes a world model pre-trained on diverse task-free behaviors for predicting future rollouts, and an off-the-shelf Vision-Language Model (VLM) for reward generation. Because both components are task-agnostic, VLAs can be readily finetuned for any new task entirely within this zero-shot imagination. Furthermore, to mitigate world model hallucinations, we introduce a dual-noise verification mechanism to filter out unreliable rollouts. Extensive experiments across simulation and real-world settings demonstrate consistent performance gains, proving that generalized physical priors can effectively substitute for costly task-dependent data, offering a highly scalable roadmap for VLA adaptation.
2605.12334.paper_summary_zh: 後訓練的視覺-語言-行動 (VLA) 模型透過強化學習 (RL) 在學習的世界模型中已成為一種有效的策略，以適應新任務而無需昂貴的現實世界互動。<lb/>然而，雖然使用想像的軌跡減少了政策訓練的樣本複雜性，但現有方法仍然在很大程度上依賴特定任務的數據來微調世界和獎勵模型，根本限制了它們對未見任務的可擴展性。<lb/>為了克服這一點，我們主張世界和獎勵模型應該捕捉可轉移的物理先驗，以實現零-shot 推斷。<lb/>我們提出了 RAW-Dream（在任務無關的世界夢中強化 VLA），這是一種全新範式，完全將世界模型學習與下游任務依賴性解耦。<lb/>RAW-Dream 利用在多樣化無任務行為上預訓練的世界模型來預測未來的滾動，並使用現成的視覺-語言模型 (VLM) 來生成獎勵。<lb/>因為這兩個組件都是與任務無關的，VLA 可以完全在這個零-shot 想像中為任何新任務進行微調。<lb/>此外，為了減少世界模型的幻覺，我們引入了一種雙噪聲驗證機制來過濾不可靠的滾動。<lb/>在模擬和現實世界設置中的廣泛實驗顯示出持續的性能增益，證明了通用的物理先驗可以有效替代昂貴的任務依賴數據，為 VLA 的適應提供了一條高度可擴展的路線圖。
2605.12334.author: Yucen Wang et.al.
2605.12334.authors: Yucen Wang, Rui Yu, Fengming Zhang, Junjie Lu, Xinyao Qin, Tianxiang Zhang, Kaixin Wang, Li Zhao
